mechanics.name: Issue Age
mechanics.description: Issue age of the insured at policy inception; drives eligibility for each level term period and selection of premium rates.

filing_sources.snippet: Minimum and maximum issue ages by level premium period are as follows...

dsl_refs.description: Issue age ranges keyed by level premium period.

mechanics.name: Risk Class
mechanics.description: Underwriting risk class (e.g. Super Preferred Non-Tobacco) used to select mortality assumptions and premium rates.

filing_sources.snippet: Risk class names as filed and the corresponding normalized risk class labels used for pricing.

dsl_refs.description: List of filed risk class labels.
Mapping from PAS / filing risk class labels to normalized engine labels.
Mapping from normalized risk classes to mortality table classes.

mechanics.name: Face Amount
mechanics.description: Initial amount of insurance in force; determines the death benefit during the level term period and interacts with face bands.

filing_sources.snippet: Minimum face amount and any stated maximums or underwriting constraints for the product.

dsl_refs.description: Minimum face amount per product design.
Maximum face amount, when constrained by design or underwriting.

mechanics.name: Face Band
mechanics.description: Face amount banding used by mortality and premium tables (e.g. Band 1: 0–999,999; Band 2: 1,000,000–2,999,999).

filing_sources.snippet: Description of face amount bands and how they apply to premium and mortality tables.

dsl_refs.description: Structured definition of face amount bands.

mechanics.name: Premium Mode
mechanics.description: Payment frequency for premiums (e.g. Annual, Monthly) and the modalization factors applied to annual rates.

filing_sources.snippet: Description of allowable premium modes and the factors used to derive modal premiums from annual rates.

dsl_refs.description: Modalization rules mapping premium modes to transformations of annual per-1000 rates.

mechanics.name: Expiry / Maturity
mechanics.description: The age or time at which coverage ends or the policy matures (term to age 95 with no cash values for P12TRF).

filing_sources.snippet: Description of the ultimate maturity age and the nonforfeiture exception (no cash values).

dsl_refs.description: Configured maturity age (e.g. 95) for the term contract.
Flag indicating that the product has no cash values (nonforfeiture exception).

mechanics.name: Premium
mechanics.description: Total premium paid by the policyowner, including both base mortality charges and policy fees, over the selected level term period.

filing_sources.snippet: Annual premium per $1,000 by issue age, gender, risk class, and level term period.

dsl_refs.description: Defines how premiums depend on issue age, gender, risk class, face band, and level period.
Risk premium charge per $1,000 of insurance driven by mortality assumptions.

mechanics.name: Level Term Period
mechanics.description: Number of years during which premiums are level and death benefit remains in force under the P12TRF term contract.

filing_sources.snippet: Level premium periods of 10, 15, 20, and 30 years are available.

dsl_refs.description: Issue age ranges by level period.

mechanics.name: Monthly Policy Fee
mechanics.description: Flat per-policy fee charged each period, within the range described in the Statement of Variability.

filing_sources.snippet: A uniform per-policy fee between $0 and $120 may be charged in all years.

dsl_refs.description: Policy fee charge applied in the projection engine.

mechanics.name: Death Benefit During Term
mechanics.description: Face amount paid if the insured dies while the policy is in force and before the end of the level term period.

filing_sources.snippet: If the Insured dies while this policy is in force and before the end of the level term period, we will pay the Face Amount shown on the Policy Schedule.

dsl_refs.description: Term to age 95 with no cash values; death benefit is payable during the level term.

mechanics.name: Conversion Privilege
mechanics.description: Right to convert the term policy to a permanent plan under certain conditions during the conversion period.

filing_sources.snippet: This policy may be converted to a permanent plan of insurance subject to the terms described in the Conversion provision.

dsl_refs.description: Indicates the presence of a conversion feature in the product design.
